items.title: The Warriors have another fascinating offseason coming. Do they chase a star? Build depth? What's Draymond's next deal look like? Re-sign KP? Go for the NTMLE? A lot of decisions to be made to wring yet another "one more year" out of the Curry/Green/Kerr core. Read more below!

items.title: JALEN BRUNSON DELIVERS 🗽
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
JALEN BRUNSON DELIVERS 🗽

During New York’s run of 11 straight wins, Brunson has averaged 26.6 PPG and 6.7 APG.

The only other players to put up 26+ PPG and 6+ APG during an 11-game win streak in a single postseason?

▪️ Steph Curry (2017)
▪️ Kobe Bryant (2001)

This is the craziest coincidence in NBA history...

11 years and 13 days ago, Steph Curry had the exact same statline as Wemby did, in the exact same scenario:
down 2-1 vs the Grizzlies, and went on to win the title.

(via KlawWrld)
#NBA

items.title: There are only 7 in NBA history who have played at least 80 postseason games and have averaged 25+ PPG and 5+ APG:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
There are only 7 in NBA history who have played at least 80 postseason games and have averaged 25+ PPG and 5+ APG:

LeBron James
Michael Jordan
Jerry West
Stephen Curry
Nikola Jokić
Giannis Antetokounmpo
Jalen Brunson

(via DJ Zullo)
#NBA
